The 4th episode of our TAL (Theater Research Laboratory) podcast series is now live!

In this episode, actor and mime artist Yaşar Nezih Eyüboğlu, who worked as a “laboratory assistant” at TAL for many years, answers questions from Sevi Algan. Yaşar N. Eyüboğlu discusses the creative processes he contributed to, his performance work, and the projects he has been involved in. You can access our podcast via the Spotify link on the @tal_arsiv profile.
